parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
actor "sidetree-core-go" as client

box "Instance 1"
participant "Operation\nQueue" as q1
end box

queue "orb.operation" as orb

database "op-queue\nDB" as db

box "Instance 2"
participant "Operation\nQueue" as q2
end box

q1 -> orb : Subscribe
activate orb
orb --> q1 : ok
deactivate orb

q2 -> orb : Subscribe
activate orb
orb --> q2 : ok
deactivate orb

client -> q1 : Add(op1)
activate q1
q1 -> orb : Publish(op1)
activate orb
orb --> q1 : ok
deactivate orb
q1 --> client : ok
deactivate q1

client -> q2 : Add(op2)
activate q2
q2 -> orb : Publish(op2)
activate orb
orb --> q2 : ok
deactivate orb
q2 --> client : ok
deactivate q2

orb -> q1 : op2
activate q1
q1 --> orb : ok
q1 -> db : Put(op2,handler1ID,expiry)
activate db
db --> q1 : ok
deactivate db
q1 -> orb : Ack(op2)
activate orb
orb --> q1 : ok
deactivate orb
deactivate q1

orb -> q2 : op1
activate q2
q2 --> orb : ok
q2 -> db : Put(op1,handler2ID,expiry)
activate db
db --> q2 : ok
deactivate db
q2 -> orb : Ack(op1)
activate orb
orb --> q2 : ok
deactivate orb
deactivate q2

@enduml
```
